Short CV

Hüsna Tosun graduated from Maltepe University, Faculty of Fine Arts, Department of Cartoon Animation in 2020 as the second in the department. Tosun continues her master's degree in Maltepe University, Fine Arts Department, Film Design program, which she started in 2020.
